title: Verify Trial Corner content is locked for a paused trial
description: Test that a user with a paused trial cannot access content from the Trial Corner screen.
preconditions: User navigates to the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 1. Navigate to the Trial Corner screen
2. Observe the content sections (Engagement, Trending, etc.)

expected_result: The content sections are displayed in a locked or disabled state, preventing interaction.
